creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

now that www/rt50 is in ports it would be nice to add rt50 support for www/p5-RT-Extension-MandatoryOnTransition.

Could you please re-flavor it, this time for rt50?

Upstream supports it:
https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/RT-Extension-MandatoryOnTransition

Thank you in advance,
